# EVP ML-KEM tests.

# Sample keys are from RFC 9935, appendix C. The sample public and private keys
# correspond to the same key. We support only the "seed" format, and not the
# "expanded" or "both" formats.

PrivateKey = ML-KEM-768-RFC-Seed
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768
Input = 3054020100300b060960864801650304040204428040000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f202122232425262728292a2b2c2d2e2f303132333435363738393a3b3c3d3e3f
Bits = 9472
RawPublic = 
PrivateSeed = 000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f202122232425262728292a2b2c2d2e2f303132333435363738393a3b3c3d3e3f

EncapsulateDecapsulate = ML-KEM-768-RFC-Seed
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768

PrivateKey = ML-KEM-768-RFC-Expanded
Input = 
Error = PRIVATE_KEY_WAS_NOT_SEED

PrivateKey = ML-KEM-768-RFC-Both
Input = 
Error = PRIVATE_KEY_WAS_NOT_SEED

PublicKey = ML-KEM-768-RFC-Public
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768
Input = 
Bits = 9472
RawPublic = 

Encapsulate = ML-KEM-768-RFC-Public
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768

PrivateKey = ML-KEM-1024-RFC-Seed
Algorithm = ML-KEM-1024
Input = 3054020100300b060960864801650304040304428040000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f202122232425262728292a2b2c2d2e2f303132333435363738393a3b3c3d3e3f
Bits = 12544
RawPublic = 
PrivateSeed = 000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f202122232425262728292a2b2c2d2e2f303132333435363738393a3b3c3d3e3f

EncapsulateDecapsulate = ML-KEM-1024-RFC-Seed
Algorithm = ML-KEM-1024

PrivateKey = ML-KEM-1024-RFC-Expanded
Input = 
Error = PRIVATE_KEY_WAS_NOT_SEED

PrivateKey = ML-KEM-1024-RFC-Both
Input = 
Error = PRIVATE_KEY_WAS_NOT_SEED

PublicKey = ML-KEM-1024-RFC-Public
Algorithm = ML-KEM-1024
Input = 
Bits = 12544
RawPublic = 

Encapsulate = ML-KEM-1024-RFC-Public
Algorithm = ML-KEM-1024

# Some test vectors from Wycheproof, to test the EVP API.
#
# TODO(crbug.com/42290453): Once we've caught up with Wycheproof, consider
# moving Wycheproof tests to the EVP layer and replacing these.

PrivateKeyFromSeed = ML-KEM-768-PrivateSeed
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768
Input = 7c9935a0b07694aa0c6d10e4db6b1add2fd81a25ccb148032dcd739936737f2d8626ed79d451140800e03b59b956f8210e556067407d13dc90fa9e8b872bfb8f

PublicKeyFromRaw = ML-KEM-768-Public
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768
Input = 

EncapsulateDecapsulate = ML-KEM-768-PrivateSeed
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768

Encapsulate = ML-KEM-768-Public
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768

Decapsulate = ML-KEM-768-PrivateSeed
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768
Input = 
Output = e7184a0975ee3470878d2d159ec83129c8aec253d4ee17b4810311d198cd0368

PrivateKeyFromSeed = ML-KEM-1024-PrivateSeed
Algorithm = ML-KEM-1024
Input = 7c9935a0b07694aa0c6d10e4db6b1add2fd81a25ccb148032dcd739936737f2d8626ed79d451140800e03b59b956f8210e556067407d13dc90fa9e8b872bfb8f

PublicKeyFromRaw = ML-KEM-1024-Public
Algorithm = ML-KEM-1024
Input = 

EncapsulateDecapsulate = ML-KEM-1024-PrivateSeed
Algorithm = ML-KEM-1024

Encapsulate = ML-KEM-1024-Public
Algorithm = ML-KEM-1024

Decapsulate = ML-KEM-1024-PrivateSeed
Algorithm = ML-KEM-1024
Input = 
Output = 489dd1e9c2be4af3482bdb35bb26ce760e6e414da6ecbe489985748a825f1cd6

# Private key too short.
PrivateKeyFromSeed = ML-KEM-768-TooShort
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768
Input = 29995944b4ad2c4a8c7120e5c581ba7c3649d309e9427ced8289072599ec98c5fe49ec6c
Error = DECODE_ERROR

# Private key too long.
PrivateKeyFromSeed = ML-KEM-768-TooLong
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768
Input = d043e3d89f9a514f84ceb3f94da9546126191bd98f2533223c07ed0a3b671ba09135c35b80d71fd7554fd765b6f64fd0ac5dcc17091af1744ff3644964c24c74f9d25ad95745e5e2be
Error = DECODE_ERROR

# Ciphertext too short.
PrivateKeyFromSeed = ML-KEM-768-CiphertextTooShort
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768
Input = 315e34ebf153d056813c44e761dd584e914c1f72910d933807ef9f098bac325f5b1d97adc2a4395c7463f9014d55b3b32b640fe4d851a83a8a94c7ced7681759

Decapsulate = ML-KEM-768-CiphertextTooShort
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768
Input = 0f9e66b3
DecapsulateFail

# Ciphertext too long.
PrivateKeyFromSeed = ML-KEM-768-CiphertextTooLong
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768
Input = e0568b5d897629a780311baab0f7213729bc677d89ee198dd20b92310df604ca467788301f7bcb3c00ea82454b1caaca23e58a6a2159b3a967784def2afe75ac

Decapsulate = ML-KEM-768-CiphertextTooLong
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768
Input = 
DecapsulateFail

# Random ciphertext.
PrivateKeyFromSeed = ML-KEM-768-RandomCiphertext
Algorithm = ML-KEM-768

# Random ciphertext.
